THE PROBLEM
We live in a cashless world. Live music hasn't caught up.
No Cash
No Cash,
No Tips
Most fans don't carry cash. Artists lose income every night because the tip jar sits empty. Not because fans don't want to tip.
Security
Venmo: A Shrinking
Workaround
Every payment method fans use flows through TipSee into one clean, protected artist payout. No chargebacks, no fraud exposure.

Every interaction moves the fan deeper. A scan becomes a song request, a payment, and a social follow — turning a stranger into a fan for life.
83% of customers more likely to return to venues with live music  ·  70% spend more on food & drinks  ·  82% recommend venues with live music  (Source: BMI)
THE SOLUTION
A patented, QR-based live music operating system, no app download required.
01
Scan QR at Venue
Fan scans a QR code, no app, no signup. Instant access.
02
Pick a Song or Tip
Fan sees the artist's live playlist, selects a request & submits payment.
03
Performance Verified
Platform confirms the song was actually performed before payment completes.
04
Artist Gets Paid
Funds route automatically. Artist earns more. Fan gets what they paid for.
Platform Includes
Song Requests + Verified Tipping
Geofenced Venue Messaging
Merch & VIP Upgrades at Live Shows
Artist & Venue Ratings Engine
Fan CRM, Email Capture from Stage
Royalty Verification (Patented)
Automated Tour Booking & Routing
Apple Pay, Google Pay, All Cards

THE PATENT MOAT
✓ ALL 22 CLAIMS APPROVED
U.S. Patent #18/207,186 · Artist Live Performance Booking Management Platform
Core Claim
Verified conditional payments tied to live music performances.
22 Protected Claim Categories
Song Requests + Verified Tipping
Merch & E-Commerce at Live Shows
VIP Access & Real-Time Privileges
Fan CRM & Audience Messaging
Geofencing Logic (in/out venue)
Artist & Venue Rating Systems
Royalty & IP Verification
Automated Tour Routing
Booking Fee Processing
Why This Matters for Investors
🏰 Defensible Moat
6+ well-funded competitors entered the market since 2019. TipSee outlasted them all, and is the only one with a patent.
🎵 Royalty Data Play
Patented setlist verification positions TipSee as a future PRO data partner, a multi-billion dollar industry running on honor-system data today.
📜 Licensing Revenue
The patent enables white-label licensing to major tours, ticketing platforms, and venue chains as a standalone revenue stream.
BUSINESS MODEL
💳 Transaction Fees
Live Now
Percentage of every tip, song request and merch purchase processed through the platform.
AT SCALE: $2–4M ARR across 5,000 active artists
🎤 Artist Subscriptions
Phase 2
Monthly SaaS tier for artists: analytics, setlist tools, fan CRM, and booking access.
AT SCALE: $3M ARR at 5,000 artists @ $50/mo
🏟 Venue Subscriptions
Phase 2
Venue dashboard, CRM plugins, talent discovery, and performance reporting.
AT SCALE: $12M ARR at 2,000 venues @ $500/mo
🎫 Booking Fees
Phase 2
Commission on every booking completed through the Rhythm Router system.
AT SCALE: $1.5M ARR at 10% of $15M in bookings
🎵 Royalty Data Licensing
Phase 3
Verified setlist data sold to PROs (ASCAP, BMI) and streaming platforms.
AT SCALE: $5M+ in licensing deals (PRO market: $4B)
📢 Advertising
Phase 3
In-venue brand targeting via real-time audience data. Bud Light, Jack Daniel's, Spotify.
AT SCALE: $3M+ in sponsorships at national rollout

Brand Moat

📰
TIPSEE BUZZ
Newsletter
The Morning Brew Opportunity
Morning Brew sold for $75M building a daily brief for business readers. TipSee Buzz is that for live music — fans, artists, and venue pros, fueled by first-party data no competitor has.
Content Pillars
Artist spotlights, venue news, TipSee data insights — top tipped songs, avg spend trends, market expansion updates.
Fan-to-Email Flywheel
Every TipSee QR scan is a subscriber opportunity, building a first-party email list organically at every show.
Monetization
Sponsor integration (Bud Light, Jack Daniel's, Spotify), paid tiers, and artist/venue promotional placements.

TipSee's home-market advantage
Nashville First Strategy
Broadway is the highest-volume live music strip in the U.S., home to Tootsie's, Kid Rock's, Jason Aldean's, Morgan Wallen's, Miranda Lambert's, and more.
TipSee is already live across the biggest names on Broadway and actively expanding beyond Nashville.
Already operating in Texas, Georgia, Florida, East Tennessee and Arizona. Five states and growing.
Six-plus well-funded competitors entered since 2019. TipSee outlasted them all and holds the only patent.
Expansion Roadmap
NOW
5 states live: TN, TX, GA, FL, AZ. Broadway to Broadway.
2026
Dominate Nashville and deepen TX, GA, FL, AZ markets.
2027
Deepen Austin, Fort Worth, Tampa with dedicated Artist/Venue Relations Managers per market.
2028+
National venue chains, major tours and festival licensing.

THE FOUNDER
Dallas Jackson
Founder & CEO
Florida State Capitol
Fidelity / Merrill Lynch
Hondo Rodeofest
Founder & COO
Relic Tickets Co-Founder
Licensed Pilot ✈
Dallas Jackson is a seasoned entrepreneur at the intersection of finance, live music, and technology. After working at Florida State Capitol, then Fidelity Investments and Merrill Lynch, where he launched a wealth management division in Nashville, he co-founded the blockchain ticketing startup Relic Tickets and served as Founder & COO of The Hondo Rodeofest, the largest rodeo music festival in the world.
"We are building the Barstool Sports of live music, blending patented technology, events, media, and merchandise to create a powerful community-driven brand around artists and fans. TipSee is the infrastructure layer the live music economy has never had."
— Dallas Jackson, Founder & CEO

WHERE DOES TIPSEE FIT?
Comparable exits validate the model. TipSee is earlier — and the only one with a patent.
$75M
Morning Brew
Acquired by Business Insider. Daily newsletter built around one vertical: business news. No tech product. Pure media + audience.
TIPSEE PARALLEL: TipSee Buzz — live music vertical with first-party data
$550M
Barstool Sports
Acquired by Penn Entertainment. Multi-show media network built around a passionate subculture — sports fans. Content, merch, brand, community.
TIPSEE PARALLEL: Multi-show network for the live music subculture
$5B
Toast
IPO. Restaurant-specific payments and operating system. Replaced generic POS with a vertical-specific platform. Same playbook — different venue.
TIPSEE PARALLEL: Live music OS — purpose-built for the venue economy
$4B+
Live Nation / PROs
ASCAP, BMI, and SESAC collectively manage billions in royalty flows running on honor-system setlist data. TipSee's patent is the verified alternative.
TIPSEE PARALLEL: Patented setlist verification = PRO data partner
Where TipSee sits today
Early-stage. Revenue live. Patent granted. Broadway presence locked. Raising $2.3M.
What no competitor has
A patent on verified, conditional live music payments — across all 22 claim categories.
The upside case
Media + payments + data platform for a $10.6B market. Multiple paths to a 9-figure outcome.
